source_conflict.summary: Official and aggregate status signals are aligned.

official.summary: Discord Statuspage API: All Systems Operational

updates.title: Discord Statuspage API: All Systems Operational
UK/AU: Issues Completing Age Verification via k-ID
updates.meta: Resolved / Minor / Resolved / k-ID age verification is operating normally again in the UK and Australia. Previously age verified users were not impacted.

updates.title: UK/AU: Issues Completing Age Verification via k-ID
updates.meta: Monitoring / Minor / Resolved / k-ID has deployed a fix for UK/AU age verification issues. We’re monitoring to ensure age verification is working normally. Previously age verified users should not be impacted.

updates.title: UK/AU: Issues Completing Age Verification via k-ID
updates.meta: Investigating / Minor / Resolved / Some users in the UK and Australia may be unable to complete new age verification via k-ID. Users who have already completed age verification should not be impacted. We’re actively working with k-ID on a resolution and will share updates he

updates.title: Guild Unavailability
updates.meta: Resolved / Major / Resolved / This incident has been resolved.

updates.title: Guild Unavailability
updates.meta: Identified / Major / Resolved / The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented.

updates.title: Guild Unavailability
updates.meta: Investigating / Major / Resolved / We're investigating an issue where some guilds are unavailable.

updates.title: A/V E2EE Enforcement for Non-stage Voice Calls
updates.meta: Monitoring / None / Monitoring / Updated clients which support the DAVE (Audio & Video End-to-End Encryption) Protocol are now required to connect to non-stages voice calls across the Discord Platform. If you attempt to connect with an out of date client, the voice gateway

updates.title: Continued issues with presence and DM delivery
updates.meta: Resolved / Major / Resolved / This incident has been resolved.

updates.title: Continued issues with presence and DM delivery
updates.meta: Monitoring / Major / Resolved / A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.

outage.summary: Discord Statuspage reports All Systems Operational. No active incidents are listed.
